texto: Yea, v-verily, she answered, understanding his thought though not his idiom and speaking without - she hoped - noticeable hesitation. "Methought I saw a serpent moving in the grass yonder, but now I see 'twas but the stirring of the breeze." She slid her hands under the paper bag in her lap to hide their trembling.Ana Vasilifata
explicacao: Citação de Werner A. Lind sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Yea, v-verily, she answered, understanding his thought though not his idiom and speaking without …” articula reflexao, accents, vampires em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como vampires.

texto: I think your hair could blow every which ways in a high wind and still look pretty," he answered, then dropped his gaze and cleared his throat. "Uh, well, are you ready to go?" he added in a brisker tone."Joshua
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Werner A. Lind que provoca esforço, persistência e resultados. Ao questionar “I think your hair could blow every which ways in a high wind and still look pretty," he answered,…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, joshua, love, com foco em love e vampires.
